text.title: Launch-Day Warroom Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the launch-day runbook + checkpoint log. Subagent must satisfy this before T-48 dress rehearsal.

field.name: roles
field.constraint: every role has primary AND backup; no person holds 2 roles

field.name: checkpoint_schedule
field.constraint: every hour in launch_window has an entry

forbidden.pattern: Any role unfilled OR backup missing OR person holds 2+ roles (violates r1)
dress_rehearsal.completed == false OR scheduled < 48h before launch (violates r2)
checkpoint_schedule with hours missing OR entries with vague "TBD" decisions (violates r3)
decision_rights entries with named_decider == null OR threshold == null (violates r4)
rollback_playbook missing any of: partial steps, full steps, criteria, exec comms (violates r5)
Channels list non-standard (e.g., only #general) — must be the 4 launch-* channels

allowed-transformations.transformation: Combine launch_support + support_triage into a single role if team is small AND launch volume is bounded.
Extend checkpoint cadence to half-hourly during the first 3 hours; revert to hourly afterward.
Add launch_legal channel if regulated industry; legal review must precede any rollback-comms post.

list.item: Every role has primary + backup, no doubles
Hourly checkpoints scheduled for full window
Every decision class has named decider + threshold
Rollback playbook covers partial + full + exec comms
